name: Cash America Pawn
description_short: FirstCash is the leading international pawn operator with 3,300+ locations across 29 U.S. states, the UK, and Latin America, offering pawn loans secured by personal property and retail merchandise sales.
description_long:
FirstCash, Inc. is headquartered in Fort Worth, Texas and operates as the largest international pawn store chain, with over 3,300 retail locations spanning 29 U.S. states, Washington D.C., the United Kingdom, and Latin America (Mexico, Guatemala, Colombia, and El Salvador). The company employs approximately 22,000 people and is included in both the S&P MidCap 400 Index and Russell 2000 Index, indicating its scale and stability as a publicly traded enterprise.

FirstCash's core business model focuses on serving cash and credit-constrained consumers through pawn loans—non-recourse loans secured by pledged personal property—and retail sales of merchandise acquired through these pawning transactions. The company buys and sells a diverse inventory including jewelry, electronics, tools, appliances, sporting goods, and musical instruments. Beyond traditional pawn services, FirstCash offers layaway services (10% down payment required), gold/precious metal buying, and retail sales from store shelves. The company also operates AFF, a wholly-owned subsidiary providing lease-to-own and retail finance payment solutions through 15,000+ merchant partner locations nationwide.

FirstCash distinguishes itself through its massive scale and international footprint—significantly larger than typical regional pawn operators—combined with a publicly traded corporate structure that provides regulatory oversight and financial transparency. The company explicitly positions itself as serving credit-constrained consumers and emphasizes the speed and accessibility of pawn loans without traditional credit requirements. Their store locator and online inventory tools reflect modernization efforts for a traditionally cash-based industry.

The primary caveat is that pawn loans, while fast and accessible, involve surrendering personal property and typically carry high implicit interest rates due to the non-recourse structure. Consumers should understand that failure to redeem pawned items results in permanent loss of property, and the loan terms are non-negotiable. While FirstCash's scale provides stability, individual store experiences may vary by location.
address: 1024 Oak Grove Rd, Fort Worth, TX 76115

company_info.headquarters: 1024 Oak Grove Rd, Fort Worth, TX 76115

pros: Largest international pawn operator with 3,300+ locations, ensuring availability and brand stability
Non-recourse pawn loans require no credit check and offer same-day or next-day funding
Publicly traded company (included in S&P MidCap 400 and Russell 2000) with regulatory oversight and financial transparency
Buys and sells diverse merchandise (jewelry, electronics, tools, instruments, appliances) providing inventory variety
Offers layaway services with only 10% down payment for customers seeking alternative purchasing options
Established gold and precious metal buying service providing immediate cash for jewelry/bullion
Online store locator and inventory tools modernize the pawn experience for consumer convenience
cons: Pawn loans carry very high effective interest rates due to the non-recourse, short-term loan structure—losing pledged property is permanent
Service only available at physical retail locations; no online pawn lending platform
Pawn loans are not recommended for long-term borrowing and can create cycles of repeated borrowing and property loss
Limited transparency on website regarding specific interest rates, fees, or loan terms—must visit individual stores
Serves primarily cash-constrained consumers, indicating loans are more expensive than alternatives like personal loans or credit lines
best_for: Consumers needing immediate cash (same-day/next-day) with no credit check or application process
People with items of value (jewelry, electronics, tools, instruments) they're willing to temporarily pledge as collateral
Shoppers seeking to purchase used merchandise at discounted prices in pawn store retail inventory
Individuals with poor credit who cannot access traditional personal loans or lines of credit
diagnosis: FirstCash is best for consumers facing immediate cash needs who have valuable personal property they can pledge as collateral and lack access to traditional credit. The critical caveat is that pawn loans carry very high effective interest rates and result in permanent loss of property if not redeemed; this is not a solution for ongoing financial needs but rather a short-term emergency cash source.
services: Non-recourse pawn loans secured by personal property (jewelry, electronics, tools, instruments, etc.)
Retail sales of new and used merchandise acquired through pawn transactions
Gold, silver, and precious metal buying—customers can sell directly for immediate cash
Layaway purchasing plans with 10% down payment option
Store locator tool to find nearest FirstCash location across 29 U.S. states and international markets
Merchandise evaluation and on-the-spot cash payment for items brought to stores
Lease-to-own and retail finance payment solutions through AFF subsidiary (15,000+ merchant partners)
Consumer finance through retail partner network for goods and services
Wide merchandise selection including jewelry, electronics, tools, appliances, sporting goods, and musical instruments
